---
name: New translation
about: Claim a language to translate, or report an update needed for an existing one
title: "[Translation] "
labels: translation
assignees: ''
---

**Language**
Which language/locale are you translating (e.g. `de_de`, `fr_fr`)? Use the
[Minecraft locale code](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Language) for it.

**Type**
- [ ] New language (doesn't exist yet under
      `potions-belt-fabric-1.21.11/src/main/resources/assets/potions-belt/lang/`)
- [ ] Update to an existing translation (outdated or has errors)

**Status**
- [ ] I intend to submit a PR myself
- [ ] I'd like someone else to pick this up (just flagging the gap)

**Notes**
Anything translators should know: regional variant preferred, terms you're
unsure how to translate, etc. See the wiki's Translations page for the
process and the current key list.
